## Controllers

### `backend/api/__init__.py`

**Description**: API package for ticket management endpoints.   Implements REST endpoints for ticket management and Telegram integration.

**Size**: 410 characters

### `backend/api/telegram.py`

**Description**: Telegram API endpoints.  Implements webhook endpoints for Telegram bot integration: - POST /api/telegram/status - Get ticket status via Telegram - POST /api/telegram/notify - Send notification to user via Telegram

**Size**: 3315 characters

**Key Elements**:
- `get_ticket_status_telegram`
- `notify_user`

### `backend/api/tickets.py`

**Description**: Ticket API endpoints.  Implements REST endpoints for ticket management: - POST /api/tickets - Create new ticket - GET /api/tickets - Get all tickets - GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/status - Get ticket status - PATCH /api/tickets/{ticket_id} - Update ticket status

**Size**: 5860 characters

**Key Elements**:
- `StatusUpdate`
- `_get_status_notification_message`
- `create_ticket_endpoint`
- `get_all_tickets_endpoint`
- `get_ticket_status_endpoint`
